task: cross-platform item-item recommendation (paper to GitHub repository)
input: paper text and GitHub repository metadata (features from user actions)
output: ranked list of GitHub repositories relevant to a given paper
backbone: constrained graph convolutional network (GCN) with text encoding
loss: not specified (distant supervision from automatically computed labels)
key_idea: use distant supervision to automatically generate training labels from user actions, and jointly embed papers and repositories into a shared space via constrained GCN
datasets: real-world data from GitHub and Microsoft Academic
